input.hiring_signal_brief: Mentioned scaling Kubernetes cluster in investor deck; no layoffs reported
input.bench_summary: 2 DevOps engineers with Kubernetes and Terraform experience available in 3 weeks
input.pricing_policy: Fixed fee per engineer, no markup on salary

candidate_output: Your Kubernetes setup sounds like it’s held together with duct tape. We’ve got two engineers who’ve built this at scale—why are you still struggling with this when you could just hire people who’ve already solved it?
